data.title: Earth Day Milestone: 2 Million Trees Planted as AnswerConnect Shows the Power of Corporate Climate Action
data.description: AnswerConnect's dedication to reforestation exemplifies how companies can make a significant environmental and social impact. Based in Portland, Oregon, the company revealed on Earth Day 2026 that its One Tree One...

data.title: Pioneering Education and Workforce Investors Close $450 Million Fund to Tackle AI-Driven Labor Market Disruption
data.description: Achieve Partners' most recent fund, supported by renowned investors Cambridge Associates, JP Morgan Asset Management, and Prudential, has surpassed expectations in developing apprenticeship programs for industries facing talent shortages. The fund announcement was made on April 22, 2026, in New York, marking a significant milestone in Achieve Partners' continued success.

data.title: Alfa Laval AB (publ) Interim report 1 January - 31 March 2026
data.description: In Lund, Sweden, as of April 22, 2026, an order intake of SEK 17.6 billion was recorded, showing a 1 percent decline compared to the previous period. The organic growth in orders was 6 percent. Net sales also saw a decrease of 3 percent, amounting to SEK 15.9 billion, with an organic growth of 2 percent. Adjusted EBITA experienced a decline, with further details on the decrease.

data.title: Arclin's Kevlar®, Kevlar® EXO™, and Nomex® Production Facility in Richmond Achieves ISCC PLUS Certification
data.description: In Alpharetta, Georgia, on April 22, 2026, a global materials science company named Arclin revealed that its Kevlar®, Kevlar® EXO™, and Nomex® manufacturing facilities located at the Spruance plant in Richmond have obtained certification from the International Sustainability organization. The certification recognizes the plant's commitment to sustainable practices in their production processes.

data.title: The Broe Group Commences Second Phase of $225 Million Cherry Creek North Development
data.description: Cushman & Wakefield has been chosen to manage the marketing of the 250 Clayton Project in Denver. Broe Real Estate Group (BREG), a Colorado-based investment firm with a significant portfolio, has selected Cushman & Wakefield for this project. The second phase of the Cherry Creek development is worth $225 million.

data.title: OpsGuru Signs Strategic Collaboration Agreement with Amazon Web Services
data.description: OpsGuru, a top AWS Premier Tier Services Partner, revealed on April 22, 2026 that they have inked a key strategic collaboration agreement (SCA) with Amazon Web Services (AWS). This move solidifies their status as the primary cloud and AI partner for companies across various scales.

data.title: DENARIUS METALS ANNOUNCES FIRST QUARTER 2026 PRODUCTION RESULTS FOR ITS ZANCUDO PROJECT IN COLOMBIA
data.description: In Toronto on April 22, 2026, Denarius Metals Corp. (Cboe CA: DMET) (OTCQX: DNRSF) shared production data for the early phase of operations at its Zancudo Project in Colombia for Q1 2026. The company disclosed key information regarding the output during this period.

data.title: ServiceForge plants two million trees worldwide
data.description: ServiceForge, a company based in Portland, Oregon, commemorates a significant achievement in its continuous effort to create a lasting influence in communities worldwide. The company, known for its 24/7 live answering and customer service platform tailored for skilled trades and home service industries, reached a milestone on April 22, 2026.

data.title: Contractor Commerce launches AI-powered conversational buying experience
data.description: Cutting-edge technology is revolutionizing the e-commerce landscape for home service contracting firms in Lebanon. On April 22, 2026, Contractor Commerce revealed their latest innovation, a bespoke e-commerce and sales support system tailored for these contractors. This platform is set to transform the industry, offering advanced solutions to streamline operations and drive sales. This development signifies a significant milestone for the sector, showcasing the potential for growth and enhanced efficiency.

data.title: CRITEO TO ANNOUNCE FIRST QUARTER 2026 FINANCIAL RESULTS ON MAY 6, 2026
data.description: On April 22, 2026, Criteo S.A. (NASDAQ: CRTO), a leading global commerce intelligence platform, disclosed that it will release its financial outcomes for the initial quarter concluding on March 31, 2026, on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. This announcement will be made by Michael Komasinski, the Chief Executive Officer, alongside Sarah.

data.title: Masco Corporation Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Masco Corporation, a prominent manufacturer of branded home improvement and building products, announced its first quarter 2026 financial results. In comparison to the first quarter of 2025, the company experienced a 6% rise in net sales, reaching $1,918 million. Additionally, net sales grew by 4% in local currency. Specifically, Plumbing Products saw a 9% increase in net sales, and a 7% increase in net sales in local currency.

data.title: Caliber Advances Hyatt Studios Development Platform Across Three High-Growth Markets
data.description: Construction in Steamboat Springs is set to kick off, marking the start of the development process in the area. This project, set to be the first in the region, will involve the construction of new buildings and infrastructure. The initiative will see an investment of approximately $10 million and is expected to create around 100 new jobs in the community. This development is a significant milestone for Steamboat Springs and is anticipated to boost economic growth in the area.
Earnings Scheduled For April 22, 2026

data.title: Pecoy Copper Completes Magnetotelluric Survey to Optimize High-Priority Targeting and Resource Expansion
data.description: Pecoy Copper recently conducted a Magnetotelluric (MT) survey at their site in Peru with the aim of enhancing geological models and providing valuable insights for upcoming drill targeting. The outcomes of this survey are projected to be disclosed during the second quarter of 2026.

data.title: US law firm regrets AI hallucinations in legal filing; Andrew Dietderich of Sullivan & Cromwell apologizes, citing errors in procedures.
data.description: Andrew Dietderich of Sullivan & Cromwell mentioned that the company has established AI policies to avoid mistakes such as inaccurate citations. However, in this instance, the procedures were not adhered to properly.

data.title: HCL Group and UpLink Launch Fifth Global Aquapreneur Innovation Challenge to Advance Future Water Systems
data.description: A partnership between HCL Group and UpLink has announced the launch of the Aquapreneur Innovation Initiative's fifth global challenge, titled "Transforming Water Systems." This initiative aims to address pressing issues in water systems worldwide.
